title: zieria veronicea
intro: Zieria veronicea, also known as the Victorian zieria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the coastal regions of southeastern Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zieria veronicea include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
